note: This is the pure-virtio (Linux bridge + vhost-net) run - no OVS/DPDK involved. host_cpu_busy_pct includes vhost-net kernel worker threads, which only consume CPU while actively forwarding packets (unlike DPDK PMD threads, which busy-poll at ~100% even when idle). Check vhost_threads_before/after.txt for kernel thread placement (psr column = host core) and ethtool_*_before/after.txt to confirm rx/tx_packets climbed on the physical NICs during the run.
